summary.en: Kuwait public charging deployments are still nascent, and a single official public requirement for OCPP integration could not be confirmed from official public sources as of 2026-06-14. For networked chargers, OCPP is the common back-office protocol used internationally for charge-point management, monitoring, fault reporting and billing integration. Project owners, charge-point operators or smart-city tenders may require OCPP support and cybersecurity review. EMC evidence should be prepared against IEC 61851-21-2 and the IEC 61000 series for off-board chargers connected to Kuwait's grid.
summary.zh: 科威特公共充电部署仍处于早期阶段，截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方公开来源确认单一公开OCPP集成强制要求。对于联网充电桩，OCPP是国际上常用的充电点管理、监控、故障报告和计费集成后台协议。项目业主、充电点运营商或智慧城市招标可能要求支持OCPP并进行网络安全审查。接入科威特电网的非车载充电设备应按IEC 61851-21-2及IEC 61000系列准备EMC证据。
summary.zht: 科威特公共充電部署仍處於早期階段，截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方公開來源確認單一公開OCPP集成強制要求。對於聯網充電樁，OCPP是國際上常用的充電點管理、監控、故障報告和計費集成後台協議。項目業主、充電點運營商或智慧城市招標可能要求支持OCPP並進行網絡安全審查。接入科威特電網的非車載充電設備應按IEC 61851-21-2及IEC 61000系列準備EMC證據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-21-2 - EMC requirements for off-board electric vehicle charging systems
Project-specific charge-point-operator, fleet or smart-city platform requirements

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 communication between the off-board charger and vehicle battery management system. GB/T 27930 is not an OCPP back-office protocol and is not a CCS2 communication substitute. China-market chargers may also use operator-specific cloud protocols; those integrations should be separately tested against the Kuwait project back office if OCPP is required.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023实现非车载充电机与车辆电池管理系统之间的通信。GB/T 27930不是OCPP后台协议，也不能替代CCS2通信。中国市场充电桩还可能使用运营商专有云协议；如科威特项目要求OCPP，应对这些集成另行进行后台测试。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023實現非車載充電機與車輛電池管理系統之間的通訊。GB/T 27930不是OCPP後台協議，也不能替代CCS2通訊。中國市場充電樁還可能使用運營商專有雲協議；如科威特項目要求OCPP，應對這些集成另行進行後台測試。

standards_or_laws: China EMC evidence for domestic market access where applicable

gap.en: Exporters must confirm the OCPP version, security profile, SIM / network requirements, remote monitoring functions, firmware-update process and back-office test plan required by the Kuwait project. EMC reports should cover the final Kuwait product variant, including IEC 62196 connectors, cable lengths, filters, radio modules and 240/415 V 50 Hz configuration. A GB/T 27930-only DC charger with no OCPP implementation is not ready for a networked public charging project.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认科威特项目要求的OCPP版本、安全配置、SIM / 网络要求、远程监控功能、固件升级流程和后台测试计划。EMC报告应覆盖最终科威特产品型号，包括IEC 62196接口、电缆长度、滤波器、无线模块及240/415 V 50 Hz配置。仅支持GB/T 27930直流通信且无OCPP实现的充电桩，不适用于联网公共充电项目。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認科威特項目要求的OCPP版本、安全配置、SIM / 網絡要求、遠程監控功能、固件升級流程和後台測試計劃。EMC報告應覆蓋最終科威特產品型號，包括IEC 62196接口、電纜長度、濾波器、無線模塊及240/415 V 50 Hz配置。僅支持GB/T 27930直流通訊且無OCPP實現的充電樁，不適用於聯網公共充電項目。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional - OCPP is mandatory when required by the Kuwait charge-point operator, fleet, tender or back-office platform; EMC evidence is expected for electrical equipment connected to the grid
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is China domestic DC vehicle-charger communication and does not satisfy OCPP back-office interoperability

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Kuwait networked chargers, confirm OCPP and back-office acceptance at project level and test the final firmware before shipment. GB/T 27930 DC communication is not an OCPP substitute, and EMC reports should cover the final Kuwait hardware configuration.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于科威特联网充电桩，应按项目确认OCPP和后台验收要求，并在发货前测试最终固件。GB/T 27930直流通信不能替代OCPP，EMC报告应覆盖最终科威特硬件配置。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於科威特聯網充電樁，應按項目確認OCPP和後台驗收要求，並在發貨前測試最終固件。GB/T 27930直流通訊不能替代OCPP，EMC報告應覆蓋最終科威特硬體配置。
